analysis: The project is a website about black holes with a focus on animated objects and slides. The current theme needs to be enhanced to better reflect the cosmic and mysterious nature of black holes. The existing CSS file has some incomplete sections and syntax errors that need to be addressed. The HTML file needs to be completed with all necessary sections, and the JavaScript file requires fixes and additional functionality for smooth animations and interactions.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a full cosmic theme, including dark backgrounds, glowing elements, swirling animations, and black hole visuals to enhance the black hole topic.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon and ensure all sections, including interactive planets and animated slides, are properly included.
Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function, complete the JavaScript content for smooth animations, and add event listeners for new buttons and mobile menu toggle functionality.
